note: Genesis row for AGENT_SPEND_AUDIT_LEDGER per genesis/AGENT_SPEND_AUTHORITY.json:91-92. Created when first cap-relevant action was contemplated (Phase 2 chutes deploy attempts 2026-05-16; zero fee charged, pre-billing rejection). Schema: append-only JSONL; each row includes spend_class (matching AGENT_SPEND_AUTHORITY.json per_session_caps keys), actual_cost_usd (0.0 if no spend occurred), runner (local-operator | github-actions | etc.), and prev_hash for chain integrity. row_hash is sha256 of payload JSON (sorted keys, no whitespace, excluding row_hash itself).
